01-31.text: ERNIE BANKS, MR. CUB, IS BORN IN DALLAS, TEXAS

02-18.text: BELOVED BROADCASTER HARRY CARAY PASSES AWAY AT 83

02-25.text: CUBS LEGEND RON SANTO IS BORN IN SEATTLE

04-08.text: WILLIE SMITH WALK-OFF PINCH HOMER WINS THE OPENER IN 11

04-16.text: BURT HOOTON THROWS A NO-HITTER AGAINST THE PHILLIES

04-20.text: CUBS PLAY THEIR FIRST GAME AT WEEGHMAN PARK, NOW WRIGLEY FIELD

04-21.text: JAKE ARRIETA NO-HITS THE REDS IN CINCINNATI

04-23.text: WEEGHMAN PARK OPENS ITS GATES FOR THE FIRST TIME

05-02.text: HIPPO VAUGHN AND FRED TONEY DUEL IN THE DOUBLE NO-HIT GAME

05-06.text: KERRY WOOD STRIKES OUT 20 ASTROS IN HIS FIFTH START

05-11.text: GLENALLEN HILL HOMERS ONTO A WAVELAND ROOFTOP

05-12.text: ERNIE BANKS HITS CAREER HOME RUN NUMBER 500 AT WRIGLEY

05-15.text: DON CARDWELL THROWS A NO-HITTER IN HIS FIRST CUBS START

05-17.text: CUBS AND PHILLIES COMBINE FOR 45 RUNS IN A 23-22 CLASSIC

06-03.text: KEN HOLTZMAN THROWS HIS SECOND CAREER NO-HITTER

06-15.text: LOU BROCK IS TRADED TO ST LOUIS FOR ERNIE BROGLIO

06-23.text: THE SANDBERG GAME: RYNO HOMERS TWICE OFF BRUCE SUTTER

06-29.text: BILLY WILLIAMS DAY AT WRIGLEY - CUBS SWEEP THE CARDS

07-26.text: GREG MADDUX RECORDS CAREER STRIKEOUT NUMBER 3000

07-31.text: RYNE SANDBERG IS INDUCTED INTO THE HALL OF FAME

08-09.text: FIRST OFFICIAL NIGHT GAME AT WRIGLEY - CUBS BEAT THE METS

08-19.text: KEN HOLTZMAN NO-HITS THE BRAVES WITHOUT A SINGLE STRIKEOUT

08-25.text: CUBS OUTSLUG THE PHILLIES 26-23 IN THE HIGHEST SCORING GAME EVER

08-30.text: JAKE ARRIETA NO-HITS THE DODGERS IN LOS ANGELES

09-02.text: MILT PAPPAS LOSES A PERFECT GAME WITH TWO OUTS IN THE 9TH, SETTLES FOR A NO-NO

09-09.text: A BLACK CAT CIRCLES RON SANTO ON DECK AT SHEA STADIUM

09-14.text: CARLOS ZAMBRANO NO-HITS THE ASTROS IN MILWAUKEE

09-17.text: ERNIE BANKS MAKES HIS MAJOR LEAGUE DEBUT

09-24.text: CUBS CLINCH THE NL EAST, FIRST TITLE OF ANY KIND SINCE 1945

09-28.text: GABBY HARTNETT HITS THE HOMER IN THE GLOAMIN
RON SANTO'S NUMBER 10 IS RETIRED AT WRIGLEY

10-01.text: BABE RUTH'S CALLED SHOT AT WRIGLEY FIELD IN THE WORLD SERIES

10-02.text: CUBS ROUT THE PADRES 13-0 IN NLCS GAME 1 AT WRIGLEY

10-14.text: CUBS WIN THE WORLD SERIES OVER DETROIT

10-22.text: CUBS WIN THE PENNANT! FIRST NL FLAG SINCE 1945

10-28.text: FIRST WORLD SERIES GAME AT WRIGLEY SINCE 1945

10-30.text: CUBS WIN WORLD SERIES GAME 5, THEIR FIRST WS WIN AT WRIGLEY SINCE 1945

11-02.text: CUBS WIN THE WORLD SERIES! 108 YEARS IN THE MAKING
